calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Labatt Porter, Appellant/Defendant on his own behalf **NO APPEARANCE**
Justin Berardi, Respondent/Plaintiff on his own behalf

At 9:19am, Department 206 clerk reported that the appellant Mr. Porter did not appear at 9am as ordered. Parties were asked to report to Department 505 before Judge Kahn at 930am.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Mr. Berardi arrives at Department 505 at 925am. The clerk informs the Court that Mr. Porter did not report to Dept 206. The Court allows a few minutes for the appellant to show up.
At 9:40am, the Court arrives and declares that the appellant Mr. Porter as no appearance.

Hearing is not held. The Court affirms the judgment filed on April 8, 2021, in favor of Justin Berardi, the respondent. No exhibits were retained by the court. The judgment on appeal is final. The case is remanded back to Small Claims Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).
